meaning: n.奖赏,奖金,奖品,捕获,捕获物,战利品adj.得奖的vt.珍视,估价,捕获,撬,撬开
examples: She stepped up to receive her prize.
She was awarded the Nobel Peace prize.
She won first prize in the competition.
In the event, though, their only other prize came for best long form music video.
Surprised Mumford and Sons took home the album of the year prize for Babel.
